name: Color Theme Test — Same Content Across All 6 Schemes
input: Create a process flow showing a basic 3-step workflow: Plan, Execute, Evaluate. Test with 'theme' color scheme.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Three-step process flow with theme-based colors applied correctly.

items.label: Plan
items.description: Define research questions, design methodology, secure funding

items.label: Execute
items.description: Collect data, run experiments, analyze results

items.label: Evaluate
items.description: Interpret findings, peer review, publish conclusions
